other_observers: On 2/19/2005: Joey Kellner, Glenn Walbek, Joe Roller, Paul Differding, Dave Johnson, Mark & Barb Yaeger, Leon Bright, Donna Emmons, Joan Williams, many others. Also, on 2/20/2005: saw the bird with Kara Lewantowicz.; I found this bird, it was also seen on 2/21/2005 by Dave Silverman and 2/23/2005 by Mark Peterson.
description: I walked up to Pueblo City Park pond, where there were several Arkansas Valley Audubon members, just meeting up for their field trip, when I noticed a male Eurasian Wigeon on the pond. I said to all there's a male Eurasian Wigeon out there. So, everyone looked at the bird. It had a all red head, with the yellowish crown, not like the white crown of the American Wigeons. The bird has gray sides all well.Behaviors: Bird was swimming on the pond, and then later on the shore.Call: nonePlumage: adult
